name: Week 6 KB Conditioning (Refine — Light)
description: Thursday = light skill drilling. Legs are tomorrow. Same rules as W5: flow, bent press, windmill, TGU at light weights. No swings, no C&P, no squats. If you earned it this week, optional 2-round circuit at the end — but ONLY if legs feel totally fresh.

sets.name: OTD Flow (Light)
sets.notes: 20lb. 2 rounds each side. Should feel effortless.

exercises.notes: 20-25lb. Groove, not grind. If Tuesday's 30 felt good, 25 here is maintenance.
25lb. Lighter than Tuesday. Drill transitions on left side.

tips: No swings, no C&P, no goblet squats, no lunges. Zero leg loading.
This is skill maintenance — keep the movement patterns fresh without any fatigue.
If you feel amazing and want to add a circuit: DON'T. You said that last time too. Squats tomorrow.
Be boring. Boring is the goal. Your legs will thank you.
